rules.Name: Jink
rules.Text: At the start or end of this Flagship's movement, you may place it up to 2" away on a line drawn directly through the centre of both side arcs. If this Flagship is on the Max Thrust Special Order, you may place it 4" along that line instead.

admiral_abilities.Name: Laser Bombardment
admiral_abilities.Effect: When you assign targets to a weapon with "Laser" in its name and an Arc of FN, that weapon gains Bombardment for that attack.

flavour:
Admiral Weaver is never a name that the UCMA want to hear is backing them up. No fewer than 6 times they have required ground forces to make a mass, emergency extraction from an AO. Many Commanders believe that Weaver is a destructive maniac, levelling precious cities instead of letting ground forces do their thing. To an extent, that's true.
While Weaver delights in ridding worlds of Scourge occupation and reducing their fleets to molten slag, the destruction of historically important sites always pains them deeply. Weaver is an avid historian, especially of golden age architecture. Prior to their enlistment they were on track to finish their masters degree at one of the most prestigious universities on Aurum. However, during the build-up to the Reconquest they felt it was part of their duty to reclaim their heritage before the Scourge ruin it forever.
Now they seek to excise the corruption that are the Scourge. Using their Perth's laser like a precision scalpel, they burn away Scourge strongholds, glassing the parasites and everything around them. Their Flagship, Nicolum's Wrath has been in service since the start of the reconquest and has an impressive kill count. Despite this it's remained relatively undamaged throughout all its engagements. Thanks to minimal crew attrition, the officers are keenly aware of the limits of the ship and routinely use what other crews would call "aggressive evasive manoeuvres" to line up the perfect shot.
